turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <!-- Sky -->
  <rect x="0" y="0" width="512" height="320" fill="#bfe6ff"/>
  <!-- Ground/Cities -->
  <rect x="0" y="300" width="512" height="212" fill="#d6e7c6"/>

  <!-- Canal -->
  <path d="M0 300 C90 295, 170 270, 260 270 C340 270, 430 305, 512 310 L512 512 L0 512 Z" fill="#5fb0d6"/>
  <path d="M0 318 C100 315, 170 290, 270 288 C355 286, 430 316, 512 326" fill="none" stroke="#3f86ad" stroke-width="10" opacity="0.75"/>

  <!-- Bridge (arched) -->
  <path d="M120 300 C165 255, 220 255, 260 300 L260 350 L120 350 Z" fill="#c9a37e" opacity="0.95"/>
  <path d="M142 320 C178 292, 205 292, 238 320" fill="none" stroke="#9a6f4a" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <rect x="205" y="300" width="25" height="60" fill="#9a6f4a"/>

  <!-- Houses along canal -->
  <g opacity="0.98">
    <rect x="20" y="285" width="70" height="110" fill="#f0efe7"/>
    <rect x="30" y="300" width="50" height="95" fill="#e9d1c7"/>
    <rect x="80" y="285" width="10" height="110" fill="#cdb7a6"/>
    <path d="M20 285 L55 255 L90 285 Z" fill="#d16a5b"/>

    <rect x="420" y="280" width="75" height="115" fill="#f0efe7"/>
    <rect x="430" y="295" width="55" height="100" fill="#e2cbd6"/>
    <path d="M420 280 L458 250 L495 280 Z" fill="#4b6fb1"/>

    <rect x="310" y="288" width="70" height="112" fill="#efe9dc"/>
    <rect x="320" y="304" width="50" height="96" fill="#d7b78e"/>
    <path d="M310 288 L345 260 L380 288 Z" fill="#b24c3f"/>

    <rect x="215" y="292" width="70" height="108" fill="#f2efe6"/>
    <rect x="225" y="307" width="50" height="93" fill="#cfe3f2"/>
    <path d="M215 292 L250 265 L285 292 Z" fill="#7a4ea3"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Windmill (left) -->
  <g transform="translate(95,105)">
    <!-- tower -->
    <rect x="60" y="160" width="30" height="170" rx="10" fill="#d8dce6"/>
    <rect x="63" y="172" width="24" height="160" rx="9" fill="#cfd5e2"/>
    <!-- top cap -->
    <path d="M58 155 C73 128, 92 128, 100 155 L95 160 L63 160 Z" fill="#b9c0d4"/>
    <!-- blades -->
    <g fill="none" stroke="#b84d43" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.95">
      <path d="M75 170 L75 60"/>
      <path d="M75 170 L120 120"/>
      <path d="M75 170 L30 120"/>
      <path d="M75 170 L75 60"/>
      <path d="M75 170 L120 120"/>
    </g>
    <g>
      <circle cx="75" cy="170" r="14" fill="#e46a5b"/>
      <circle cx="75" cy="170" r="6" fill="#b34a42"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Tulips (garden) -->
  <g>
    <!-- stems -->
    <path d="M70 440 C68 410, 72 388, 82 362" stroke="#2f8f55" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M110 452 C110 420, 115 395, 125 370" stroke="#2f8f55" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M160 455 C160 420, 168 395, 178 370" stroke="#2f8f55" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- flowers -->
    <path d="M78 360 C72 344, 66 333, 80 320 C94 333, 88 344, 78 360 Z" fill="#ff5a7a"/>
    <path d="M122 372 C116 356, 110 345, 124 332 C138 345, 132 356, 122 372 Z" fill="#ffd24a"/>
    <path d="M178 372 C172 356, 166 345, 180 332 C194 345, 188 356, 178 372 Z" fill="#4d7dff"/>

    <!-- petals hints -->
    <path d="M78 360 C74 348, 72 338, 80 320" stroke="#d93b5c" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M122 372 C118 360, 116 350, 124 332" stroke="#caa62a" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M178 372 C174 360, 172 350, 180 332" stroke="#345cd6" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Bicycle (simple) -->
  <g transform="translate(290,395)" opacity="0.98">
    <!-- wheels -->
    <circle cx="-30" cy="75" r="33" fill="#2a2f36"/>
    <circle cx="-30" cy="75" r="24" fill="none" stroke="#cfd6df" stroke-width="4"/>
    <circle cx="65" cy="75" r="33" fill="#2a2f36"/>
    <circle cx="65" cy="75" r="24" fill="none" stroke="#cfd6df" stroke-width="4"/>

    <!-- frame -->
    <path d="M-30 75 L10 20 L48 20 L65 75 L10 75 L-5 45 Z" fill="#4b79d6" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M10 20 L0 75" stroke="#234a9a" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M48 20 L65 75" stroke="#234a9a" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M-5 45 L10 75" stroke="#234a9a" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- seat & handle -->
    <path d="M42 14 L24 10" stroke="#2f2f2f" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M48 20 L70 10" stroke="#2f2f2f" stroke-width="8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M24 10 L22 20" stroke="#2f2f2f" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- pedals/chain hints -->
    <circle cx="10" cy="58" r="6" fill="#2f2f2f"/>
    <path d="M10 58 L48 20" stroke="#2f2f2f" stroke-width="5" fill="none"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Foreground grass edge -->
  <path d="M0 440 C80 420, 160 452, 260 440 C345 430, 420 455, 512 440 L512 512 L0 512 Z" fill="#a8c98a" opacity="0.95"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Conceptualizing Amsterdam Illustration**

I'm thinking about how to create a visual representation of Amsterdam without using any words. I plan to include iconic elements like canals, windmills, tulips, and bicycles. A straightforward approach could be to use SVG to build a simple scene with a background sky, a water canal, a bridge, and the silhouette of a windmill. Maybe I should also add a bicycle outline. The goal is to convey the essence of Amsterdam in a clean, text-free illustration.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
